name: @clearcapabilities/agentic-security-scanner
description: Scanner engine for the agentic-security Claude Code plugin — SAST, SCA (function-level reachability + CISA KEV), secrets, IaC, prompt-injection, MCP/agent-tool audit, auth/authZ deep analysis, attack chains, PoC generation, business logic, toxic-combinations scoring, SBOM, SARIF ingest, pipeline integrity, compliance attestation, and more.

scripts.build: ncc build bin/agentic-security.js -o dist --minify && mv dist/index.js dist/agentic-security.mjs && rm -f dist/package.json && chmod +x dist/agentic-security.mjs
scripts.test: node --test test/smoke.test.js test/llm.test.js test/logic.test.js test/fn-reach.test.js test/material-change.test.js test/drift.test.js test/sbom.test.js test/api-inventory.test.js test/sarif-ingest.test.js test/pipeline.test.js test/license-policy.test.js test/mttr.test.js test/container.test.js test/dep-confusion.test.js test/scorecard.test.js test/mcp-audit.test.js test/authz.test.js test/kev.test.js test/model-load.test.js test/prompt-template.test.js test/llm-owasp.test.js test/aibom.test.js test/packs.test.js test/junit.test.js test/ci.test.js

author: Ross Young <ross@clearcapabilities.com>
